定位重要发展客户关注的爆款产品¶

产品浏览量、销量、销售额汇总¶

In [133]:
"""筛选出“重要发展客户”的“浏览”与“购买”行为数据"""
# 【high_potential_users_event：重要发展客户的行为数据】
high_potential_view_event = high_potential_users_event[high_potential_users_event['行为分类'] == '浏览']  # 重要发展客户的所有浏览行为数据
high_potential_purchase_event = high_potential_users_event[high_potential_users_event['行为分类'] == '购买']  # 重要发展客户的所有购买行为数据
"""计算每个产品的浏览量"""
high_potential_product_view = high_potential_view_event.groupby("产品ID")["行为分类"].count()  # 按‘产品ID’对数据进行分组，统计每个产品的浏览量
high_potential_product_view_df = high_potential_product_view.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
high_potential_product_view_df = high_potential_product_view_df.rename(columns={"行为分类":"浏览量"})  # 更正列索引
high_potential_product_view_df = high_potential_product_view_df.set_index('产品ID')  # 指定产品ID为索引列，用于多表合并
"""计算每个产品的销量"""
high_potential_product_purchase = high_potential_purchase_event.groupby("产品ID")["行为分类"].count()  # 按‘产品ID’对数据进行分组，统计每个产品的销量
high_potential_product_purchase_df = high_potential_product_purchase.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
high_potential_product_purchase_df = high_potential_product_purchase_df.rename(columns={"行为分类":"销量"})  # 更正列索引
high_potential_product_purchase_df = high_potential_product_purchase_df.set_index('产品ID')  # 指定产品ID为索引列，用于多表合并
"""计算每个产品的销售额"""
high_potential_product_sale = high_potential_purchase_event.groupby("产品ID")["产品价格"].sum()  # 按‘产品ID’对数据进行分组，统计每个产品的销售额
high_potential_product_sale_df = high_potential_product_sale.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
high_potential_product_sale_df = high_potential_product_sale_df.rename(columns={"产品价格":"销售额"})  # 更正列索引
high_potential_product_sale_df = high_potential_product_sale_df.set_index('产品ID')  # 指定产品ID为索引列，用于多表合并
"""产品浏览量、销量、销售额汇总"""
high_potential_product_view_purchase_sale_df = high_potential_product_view_df.join([high_potential_product_purchase_df, high_potential_product_sale_df], how='outer')  # 全连接，保留所有产品
high_potential_product_view_purchase_sale_df = high_potential_product_view_purchase_sale_df.fillna(0)  # 将多出来的空值置0
high_potential_product_view_purchase_sale_df = high_potential_product_view_purchase_sale_df.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
high_potential_product_view_purchase_sale_df.head()
Out[133]:

print(f'浏览量权重：{high_potential_view_w}\n销量权重：{high_potential_purchase_w}\n销售额权重：{high_potential_sale_w}')

定位一般发展客户关注的爆款产品¶

产品浏览量、销量、销售额汇总¶

In [136]:
"""筛选出“一般发展客户”的“浏览”与“购买”行为数据"""
# 【average_potential_users_event：一般发展客户的行为数据】
average_potential_view_event = average_potential_users_event[average_potential_users_event['行为分类'] == '浏览']  # 一般发展客户的所有浏览行为数据
average_potential_purchase_event = average_potential_users_event[average_potential_users_event['行为分类'] == '购买']  # 一般发展客户的所有购买行为数据
"""计算每个产品的浏览量"""
average_potential_product_view = average_potential_view_event.groupby("产品ID")["行为分类"].count()  # 按‘产品ID’对数据进行分组，统计每个产品的浏览量
average_potential_product_view_df = average_potential_product_view.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
average_potential_product_view_df = average_potential_product_view_df.rename(columns={"行为分类":"浏览量"})  # 更正列索引
average_potential_product_view_df = average_potential_product_view_df.set_index('产品ID')  # 指定产品ID为索引列，用于多表合并
"""计算每个产品的销量"""
average_potential_product_purchase = average_potential_purchase_event.groupby("产品ID")["行为分类"].count()  # 按‘产品ID’对数据进行分组，统计每个产品的销量
average_potential_product_purchase_df = average_potential_product_purchase.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
average_potential_product_purchase_df = average_potential_product_purchase_df.rename(columns={"行为分类":"销量"})  # 更正列索引
average_potential_product_purchase_df = average_potential_product_purchase_df.set_index('产品ID')  # 指定产品ID为索引列，用于多表合并
"""计算每个产品的销售额"""
average_potential_product_sale = average_potential_purchase_event.groupby("产品ID")["产品价格"].sum()  # 按‘产品ID’对数据进行分组，统计每个产品的销售额
average_potential_product_sale_df = average_potential_product_sale.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
average_potential_product_sale_df = average_potential_product_sale_df.rename(columns={"产品价格":"销售额"})  # 更正列索引
average_potential_product_sale_df = average_potential_product_sale_df.set_index('产品ID')  # 指定产品ID为索引列，用于多表合并
"""产品浏览量、销量、销售额汇总"""
average_potential_product_view_purchase_sale_df = average_potential_product_view_df.join([average_potential_product_purchase_df, average_potential_product_sale_df], how='outer')  # 全连接，保留所有产品
average_potential_product_view_purchase_sale_df = average_potential_product_view_purchase_sale_df.fillna(0)  # 将多出来的空值置0
average_potential_product_view_purchase_sale_df = average_potential_product_view_purchase_sale_df.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
average_potential_product_view_purchase_sale_df.head()

定位重要保持客户关注的爆款产品¶

产品浏览量、销量、销售额汇总¶

In [139]:
"""筛选出“重要保持客户”的“浏览”与“购买”行为数据"""
# 【high_retention_users_event：重要保持客户的行为数据】
high_retention_view_event = high_retention_users_event[high_retention_users_event['行为分类'] == '浏览']  # 重要保持客户的所有浏览行为数据
high_retention_purchase_event = high_retention_users_event[high_retention_users_event['行为分类'] == '购买']  # 重要保持客户的所有购买行为数据
"""计算每个产品的浏览量"""
high_retention_product_view = high_retention_view_event.groupby("产品ID")["行为分类"].count()  # 按‘产品ID’对数据进行分组，统计每个产品的浏览量
high_retention_product_view_df = high_retention_product_view.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
high_retention_product_view_df = high_retention_product_view_df.rename(columns={"行为分类":"浏览量"})  # 更正列索引
high_retention_product_view_df = high_retention_product_view_df.set_index('产品ID')  # 指定产品ID为索引列，用于多表合并
"""计算每个产品的销量"""
high_retention_product_purchase = high_retention_purchase_event.groupby("产品ID")["行为分类"].count()  # 按‘产品ID’对数据进行分组，统计每个产品的销量
high_retention_product_purchase_df = high_retention_product_purchase.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
high_retention_product_purchase_df = high_retention_product_purchase_df.rename(columns={"行为分类":"销量"})  # 更正列索引
high_retention_product_purchase_df = high_retention_product_purchase_df.set_index('产品ID')  # 指定产品ID为索引列，用于多表合并
"""计算每个产品的销售额"""
high_retention_product_sale = high_retention_purchase_event.groupby("产品ID")["产品价格"].sum()  # 按‘产品ID’对数据进行分组，统计每个产品的销售额
high_retention_product_sale_df = high_retention_product_sale.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
high_retention_product_sale_df = high_retention_product_sale_df.rename(columns={"产品价格":"销售额"})  # 更正列索引
high_retention_product_sale_df = high_retention_product_sale_df.set_index('产品ID')  # 指定产品ID为索引列，用于多表合并
"""产品浏览量、销量、销售额汇总"""
high_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df = high_retention_product_view_df.join([high_retention_product_purchase_df, high_retention_product_sale_df], how='outer')  # 全连接，保留所有产品
high_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df = high_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df.fillna(0)  # 将多出来的空值置0
high_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df = high_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
high_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df.head()
Out[139]:
产品ID 浏览量 销量 销售额
0 10073 21.0 1.0 3.98
1 10075 4.0 1.0 2.27
2 10077 11.0 1.0 3.41
3 10078 7.0 2.0 4.54
4 10090 6.0 1.0 5.24

计算“浏览量、销量、销售额”权重¶

In [140]:
high_retention_view_w, high_retention_purchase_w, high_retention_sale_w, high_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization = product_weight_def(high_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df)
print(f'浏览量权重：{high_retention_view_w}\n销量权重：{high_retention_purchase_w}\n销售额权重：{high_retention_sale_w}')
print('归一化后的数据表如下：')
high_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization.head()

浏览量权重：0.15085235886879111
销量权重：0.45323570833261595
销售额权重：0.39591193279859294
归一化后的数据表如下：
Out[140]:
浏览量 销量 销售额
0 0.375002 0.097010 0.169057
1 0.195256 0.097010 0.124762
2 0.301466 0.097010 0.156257
3 0.252276 0.153756 0.180279
4 0.236076 0.097010 0.192808

应用权重，定位重要保持客户最感兴趣的10款产品¶

In [141]:
# 【high_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df：产品浏览量、销量、销售额汇总表】
# 【high_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization：产品浏览量、销量、销售额归一化值表】
high_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df["评分"] = high_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization["浏览量"] * high_retention_view_w + high_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization["销量"] * high_retention_purchase_w + high_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization["销售额"] * high_retention_sale_w
high_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df = high_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df.sort_values('评分', ascending=False)  # 按照评分从大到小对产品进行排列
high_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df.head(n=10)
Out[141]:

15128 5809911 1699.0 423.0 2185.15 0.840477

16691 5815662 1267.0 749.0 675.83 0.822408

定位一般保持客户关注的爆款产品¶

产品浏览量、销量、销售额汇总¶

In [142]:
"""筛选出“一般保持客户”的“浏览”与“购买”行为数据"""
# 【average_retention_users_event：一般保持客户的行为数据】
average_retention_view_event = average_retention_users_event[average_retention_users_event['行为分类'] == '浏览']  # 一般保持客户的所有浏览行为数据
average_retention_purchase_event = average_retention_users_event[average_retention_users_event['行为分类'] == '购买']  # 一般保持客户的所有购买行为数据
"""计算每个产品的浏览量"""
average_retention_product_view = average_retention_view_event.groupby("产品ID")["行为分类"].count()  # 按‘产品ID’对数据进行分组，统计每个产品的浏览量
average_retention_product_view_df = average_retention_product_view.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
average_retention_product_view_df = average_retention_product_view_df.rename(columns={"行为分类":"浏览量"})  # 更正列索引
average_retention_product_view_df = average_retention_product_view_df.set_index('产品ID')  # 指定产品ID为索引列，用于多表合并
"""计算每个产品的销量"""
average_retention_product_purchase = average_retention_purchase_event.groupby("产品ID")["行为分类"].count()  # 按‘产品ID’对数据进行分组，统计每个产品的销量
average_retention_product_purchase_df = average_retention_product_purchase.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
average_retention_product_purchase_df = average_retention_product_purchase_df.rename(columns={"行为分类":"销量"})  # 更正列索引
average_retention_product_purchase_df = average_retention_product_purchase_df.set_index('产品ID')  # 指定产品ID为索引列，用于多表合并
"""计算每个产品的销售额"""
average_retention_product_sale = average_retention_purchase_event.groupby("产品ID")["产品价格"].sum()  # 按‘产品ID’对数据进行分组，统计每个产品的销售额
average_retention_product_sale_df = average_retention_product_sale.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
average_retention_product_sale_df = average_retention_product_sale_df.rename(columns={"产品价格":"销售额"})  # 更正列索引
average_retention_product_sale_df = average_retention_product_sale_df.set_index('产品ID')  # 指定产品ID为索引列，用于多表合并
"""产品浏览量、销量、销售额汇总"""
average_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df = average_retention_product_view_df.join([average_retention_product_purchase_df, average_retention_product_sale_df], how='outer')  # 全连接，保留所有产品
average_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df = average_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df.fillna(0)  # 将多出来的空值置0
average_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df = average_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
average_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df.head()
Out[142]:
产品ID 浏览量 销量 销售额

1 10075 3.0 0.0 0.00
2 10077 2.0 0.0 0.00

计算“浏览量、销量、销售额”权重¶

In [143]:
average_retention_view_w, average_retention_purchase_w, average_retention_sale_w, average_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization = product_weight_def(average_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df)
print(f'浏览量权重：{average_retention_view_w}\n销量权重：{average_retention_purchase_w}\n销售额权重：{average_retention_sale_w}')
print('归一化后的数据表如下：')
average_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization.head()

应用权重，定位一般保持客户最感兴趣的10款产品¶

In [144]:
# 【average_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df：产品浏览量、销量、销售额汇总表】
# 【average_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization：产品浏览量、销量、销售额归一化值表】
average_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df["评分"] = average_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization["浏览量"] * average_retention_view_w + average_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization["销量"] * average_retention_purchase_w + average_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization["销售额"] * average_retention_sale_w
average_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df = average_retention_product_view_purchase_sale_df.sort_values('评分', ascending=False)  # 按照评分从大到小对产品进行排列

定位重要挽留客户关注的爆款产品¶

产品浏览量、销量、销售额汇总¶

In [145]:
"""筛选出“重要挽留客户”的“浏览”与“购买”行为数据"""
# 【high_retain_users_event：重要挽留客户的行为数据】
high_retain_view_event = high_retain_users_event[high_retain_users_event['行为分类'] == '浏览']  # 重要挽留客户的所有浏览行为数据
high_retain_purchase_event = high_retain_users_event[high_retain_users_event['行为分类'] == '购买']  # 重要挽留客户的所有购买行为数据
"""计算每个产品的浏览量"""
high_retain_product_view = high_retain_view_event.groupby("产品ID")["行为分类"].count()  # 按‘产品ID’对数据进行分组，统计每个产品的浏览量
high_retain_product_view_df = high_retain_product_view.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
high_retain_product_view_df = high_retain_product_view_df.rename(columns={"行为分类":"浏览量"})  # 更正列索引
high_retain_product_view_df = high_retain_product_view_df.set_index('产品ID')  # 指定产品ID为索引列，用于多表合并
"""计算每个产品的销量"""
high_retain_product_purchase = high_retain_purchase_event.groupby("产品ID")["行为分类"].count()  # 按‘产品ID’对数据进行分组，统计每个产品的销量
high_retain_product_purchase_df = high_retain_product_purchase.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
high_retain_product_purchase_df = high_retain_product_purchase_df.rename(columns={"行为分类":"销量"})  # 更正列索引
high_retain_product_purchase_df = high_retain_product_purchase_df.set_index('产品ID')  # 指定产品ID为索引列，用于多表合并
"""计算每个产品的销售额"""
high_retain_product_sale = high_retain_purchase_event.groupby("产品ID")["产品价格"].sum()  # 按‘产品ID’对数据进行分组，统计每个产品的销售额
high_retain_product_sale_df = high_retain_product_sale.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
high_retain_product_sale_df = high_retain_product_sale_df.rename(columns={"产品价格":"销售额"})  # 更正列索引
high_retain_product_sale_df = high_retain_product_sale_df.set_index('产品ID')  # 指定产品ID为索引列，用于多表合并
"""产品浏览量、销量、销售额汇总"""
high_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df = high_retain_product_view_df.join([high_retain_product_purchase_df, high_retain_product_sale_df], how='outer')  # 全连接，保留所有产品
high_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df = high_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df.fillna(0)  # 将多出来的空值置0
high_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df = high_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
high_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df.head()

计算“浏览量、销量、销售额”权重¶

In [146]:
high_retain_view_w, high_retain_purchase_w, high_retain_sale_w, high_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization = product_weight_def(high_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df)
print(f'浏览量权重：{high_retain_view_w}\n销量权重：{high_retain_purchase_w}\n销售额权重：{high_retain_sale_w}')

# 【high_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization：产品浏览量、销量、销售额归一化值表】
high_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df["评分"] = high_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization["浏览量"] * high_retain_view_w + high_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization["销量"] * high_retain_purchase_w + high_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization["销售额"] * high_retain_sale_w
high_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df = high_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df.sort_values('评分', ascending=False)  # 按照评分从大到小对产品进行排列

定位一般挽留客户关注的爆款产品¶

产品浏览量、销量、销售额汇总¶

In [148]:
"""筛选出“一般挽留客户”的“浏览”与“购买”行为数据"""
# 【average_retain_users_event：一般挽留客户的行为数据】
average_retain_view_event = average_retain_users_event[average_retain_users_event['行为分类'] == '浏览']  # 一般挽留客户的所有浏览行为数据
average_retain_purchase_event = average_retain_users_event[average_retain_users_event['行为分类'] == '购买']  # 一般挽留客户的所有购买行为数据
"""计算每个产品的浏览量"""
average_retain_product_view = average_retain_view_event.groupby("产品ID")["行为分类"].count()  # 按‘产品ID’对数据进行分组，统计每个产品的浏览量
average_retain_product_view_df = average_retain_product_view.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
average_retain_product_view_df = average_retain_product_view_df.rename(columns={"行为分类":"浏览量"})  # 更正列索引
average_retain_product_view_df = average_retain_product_view_df.set_index('产品ID')  # 指定产品ID为索引列，用于多表合并
"""计算每个产品的销量"""
average_retain_product_purchase = average_retain_purchase_event.groupby("产品ID")["行为分类"].count()  # 按‘产品ID’对数据进行分组，统计每个产品的销量
average_retain_product_purchase_df = average_retain_product_purchase.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
average_retain_product_purchase_df = average_retain_product_purchase_df.rename(columns={"行为分类":"销量"})  # 更正列索引
average_retain_product_purchase_df = average_retain_product_purchase_df.set_index('产品ID')  # 指定产品ID为索引列，用于多表合并
"""计算每个产品的销售额"""
average_retain_product_sale = average_retain_purchase_event.groupby("产品ID")["产品价格"].sum()  # 按‘产品ID’对数据进行分组，统计每个产品的销售额
average_retain_product_sale_df = average_retain_product_sale.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
average_retain_product_sale_df = average_retain_product_sale_df.rename(columns={"产品价格":"销售额"})  # 更正列索引
average_retain_product_sale_df = average_retain_product_sale_df.set_index('产品ID')  # 指定产品ID为索引列，用于多表合并
"""产品浏览量、销量、销售额汇总"""
average_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df = average_retain_product_view_df.join([average_retain_product_purchase_df, average_retain_product_sale_df], how='outer')  # 全连接，保留所有产品
average_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df = average_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df.fillna(0)  # 将多出来的空值置0
average_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df = average_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df.reset_index()  # 重置索引，拆出产品ID
average_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df.head()

计算“浏览量、销量、销售额”权重¶

In [149]:
average_retain_view_w, average_retain_purchase_w, average_retain_sale_w, average_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization = product_weight_def(average_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df)
print(f'浏览量权重：{average_retain_view_w}\n销量权重：{average_retain_purchase_w}\n销售额权重：{average_retain_sale_w}')
print('归一化后的数据表如下：')
average_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization.head()

浏览量权重：0.07951340047710671
销量权重：0.4689877754004572
销售额权重：0.451498824122436
归一化后的数据表如下：
Out[149]:

1 0.147430 0.000001 0.000001
2 0.147430 0.000001 0.000001

4 0.093018 0.000001 0.000001

应用权重，定位一般挽留用户最感兴趣的10款产品¶

In [150]:
# 【average_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df：产品浏览量、销量、销售额汇总表】
# 【average_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization：产品浏览量、销量、销售额归一化值表】
average_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df["评分"] = average_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization["浏览量"] * average_retain_view_w + average_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization["销量"] * average_retain_purchase_w + average_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_normalization["销售额"] * average_retain_sale_w
average_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df = average_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df.sort_values('评分', ascending=False)  # 按照评分从大到小对产品进行排列
average_retain_product_view_purchase_sale_df.head(n=10)

爆款产品总结¶

小结¶

  1. 网店总体爆款产品：'5751422', '5751383', '5809912', '5528035', '5809910', '5809911', '5849033', '5816170', '5792800', '5560754'
  2. 重要价值客户关注的爆款产品：'5751742', '5751422', '5751383', '5809912', '5528035', '5809910', '5809911', '5849033', '5816170', '5792800'
  3. 一般价值客户关注的爆款产品：'5815662', '5809912', '5809910', '5802432', '5304', '5854897', '5759492', '5700037', '5776130', '5686925'
  4. 重要发展客户关注的爆款产品：'5692527', '5751422', '5728072', '5877454', '5809910', '5804820', '5846437', '5677043', '5877453', '5560754'
  5. 一般发展客户关注的爆款产品：'5790563', '5649236', '5751383', '5809912', '5528035', '5809910', '5790689', '5764716', '5759492', '5677043'
  6. 重要保持客户关注的爆款产品：'5751422', '5751383', '5815662', '5809912', '5528035', '5809910', '5809911', '5849033', '5792800', '5877454'
  7. 一般保持客户关注的爆款产品：'5549834', '5815662', '5809910', '5802432', '5304', '5854897', '5759492', '5013', '5700037', '5833330'
  8. 重要挽留客户关注的爆款产品：'5692527', '5751422', '5751383', '5856186', '4185', '5804820', '5846437', '5677043', '5877454', '5560754'
  9. 一般挽留客户关注的爆款产品：'5790563', '5649236', '5751383', '5809912', '5528035', '5809910', '5764716', '5793261', '5759492', '5677043'

总结与建议¶

  1. 跨年期间，用户对化妆品的浏览与购买意愿较低，建议提前调整跨年期间的营销预算，或跨年期间转向推广节日关联产品。
  2. 购物节日期间，用户参与活动的时间分布呈现“首尾双峰、中间低迷”的特征，建议在活动开始和结束两天增大网店爆款产品推广力度，并在活动持续期间不定时增加“中场秒杀”活动以激励用户消费。
    1. 网店爆款产品：'5751422', '5751383', '5809912', '5528035', '5809910', '5809911', '5849033', '5816170', '5792800', '5560754'
  3. 网店用户平均会话时长逐月降低，且出现大量低质量用户，建议优化产品详情页，进一步突出产品卖点，以增大产品对用户的吸引力。
  4. 未有过购买行为的用户将产品加入购物车后‘加购→购买’转化率仅33.16%，建议为加购用户附赠店铺折扣券，以增强用户购买意愿。
  5. 有过购买行为的用户更习惯于将产品加入购物车后再进行购买决策，且“加购→购买”转化率均在99%以上，建议在购物车内做精准爆款推荐，利用高转化率撬动产品交叉销售。
    1. 重要价值客户关注的爆款产品：'5751742', '5751422', '5751383', '5809912', '5528035', '5809910', '5809911', '5849033', '5816170', '5792800'
    2. 一般价值客户关注的爆款产品：'5815662', '5809912', '5809910', '5802432', '5304', '5854897', '5759492', '5700037', '5776130', '5686925'
    3. 重要发展客户关注的爆款产品：'5692527', '5751422', '5728072', '5877454', '5809910', '5804820', '5846437', '5677043', '5877453', '5560754'
    4. 一般发展客户关注的爆款产品：'5790563', '5649236', '5751383', '5809912', '5528035', '5809910', '5790689', '5764716', '5759492', '5677043'
    5. 重要保持客户关注的爆款产品：'5751422', '5751383', '5815662', '5809912', '5528035', '5809910', '5809911', '5849033', '5792800', '5877454'
    6. 一般保持客户关注的爆款产品：'5549834', '5815662', '5809910', '5802432', '5304', '5854897', '5759492', '5013', '5700037', '5833330'
    7. 重要挽留客户关注的爆款产品：'5692527', '5751422', '5751383', '5856186', '4185', '5804820', '5846437', '5677043', '5877454', '5560754'
    8. 一般挽留客户关注的爆款产品：'5790563', '5649236', '5751383', '5809912', '5528035', '5809910', '5764716', '5793261', '5759492', '5677043'
